task_completion.description: Open the PsychoPy Builder and load the Stroop demo experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder application window is open, displaying the Stroop experiment flow and routines.

task_completion.description: Add a new routine named 'instructions' at the beginning of the experiment flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flow' panel at the bottom of the PsychoPy window, there is a routine box explicitly named 'instructions' placed before the main trial loop.

task_completion.description: Add a text component to the 'instructions' routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'instructions' routine open in the top panel, a Text component (indicated by a 'T' icon or text label) is visible in the routine's component timeline.

task_completion.description: Add a keyboard component to the 'instructions' routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'instructions' routine open in the top panel, a Keyboard component (indicated by a keyboard icon) is visible in the routine's component timeline.

task_completion.description: Set the trial loop repetitions (nReps) to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flow' panel, the loop wrapping the trial routine displays 'nReps=3' (or similar indicator of 3 repetitions), OR the Loop Properties dialog box is open showing the 'nReps' field set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Save the modified experiment as 'stroop_modified.psyexp' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the PsychoPy window displays 'stroop_modified.psyexp', or a file explorer/terminal window shows the file 'stroop_modified.psyexp' successfully created in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to modify the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (e.g., clicking buttons, opening component dialogs) rather than editing the raw .psyexp XML/JSON file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run commands like 'sed', 'awk', or Python scripts to directly inject the new routine or modify the nReps value in the file.

integrity.description: The original Stroop trial structure remains intact.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Flow' panel still shows the original 'trial' routine inside its loop, and it has not been deleted or completely overwritten by the new instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is strictly '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_modified.psyexp'. The PsychoPy Builder Flow panel must show a new routine specifically named 'instructions' placed before the trial loop. The 'instructions' routine must contain both a text component and a keyboard component. The trial loop must show 'nReps' set to 3.
